decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with creatures and then using Survival of the Fittest to tutor for powerful threats. The strategy revolves around using efficient creatures like Basking Rootwalla and Wild Mongrel to pressure the opponent while disrupting their hand with Cabal Therapy and Duress. The deck also includes cards like Zombie Infestation and Squee, Goblin Nabob to generate value from the graveyard. The key is to utilize the synergy between discarding creatures, graveyard recursion, and creature tutoring to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless aggro strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat that can overwhelm the opponent. This deck aims to disrupt the opponent's plays using counterspells and utility cards like Vision Charm, while also drawing cards to find key pieces of the combo with Accumulated Knowledge and Impulse. The deck also includes some versatile removal and bounce spells like Chain of Vapor and Powder Keg to deal with problematic permanents on the opponent's side of the board.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by disrupting the opponent's resources with cards like Sphere of Resistance, Stone Rain, and Wasteland. Oath of Druids is used to bring out powerful creatures like Terravore quickly, while Sylvan Library ensures card advantage. The deck also includes removal spells like Naturalize, Pyroclasm, and Earthquake for added control. The manabase includes lands that can produce multiple colors of mana and utility lands like Rishadan Port and Mishra's Factory. Overall, this deck aims to control the game until it can overwhelm the opponent with its big creatures.

The deck focuses on using control elements and survival tactics to outlast opponents. It runs a mixture of creatures and spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect its own key cards. With cards like Meddling Mage and Swords to Plowshares, it aims to control the board while utilizing Survival of the Fittest to tutor for critical creatures like Gilded Drake and Exalted Angel. The inclusion of Wall of Roots and Wall of Blossoms provides early defense, while Sylvan Library helps with card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to outlast opponents and win through efficient creature threats.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. The deck aims to quickly establish a strong board presence using creatures like Blastoderm, Exalted Angel, and Stampeding Wildebeests, supported by mana ramp from Birds of Paradise and Llanowar Elves. The deck also includes cards like Swords to Plowshares for removal and Living Wish for additional creature options. The strategy is to apply constant pressure on the opponent while maintaining card advantage through cards like Wall of Blossoms and Sylvan Library.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's hand and resources while applying consistent pressure with discard spells and efficient creatures. Cards like Cabal Therapy, Duress, and The Rack help to strip the opponent's hand, while creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Ravenous Rats provide a clock. The deck also runs disruption in the form of Wasteland and Engineered Plague, as well as removal spells like Diabolic Edict and Smother. The goal is to grind the opponent down with a combination of hand disruption, creature removal, and efficient threats.

The deck focuses on quickly cycling through the deck to set up a powerful combo with Replenish, bringing back multiple enchantments such as Opalescence, Parallax Tide, and Parallax Wave to overwhelm the opponent. Various control elements like Stifle and Miscalculation are used to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's strategies. The deck aims to establish board dominance and control the game using a combination of enchantments and removal spells, ultimately securing victory through a well-timed Replenish.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Madness mechanic to quickly put powerful creatures onto the battlefield while also disrupting opponents with counter spells. By discarding cards with Madness, players can efficiently control the game by countering spells and deploying threats at the same time. The deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent while maintaining card advantage and tempo with efficient creature spells and card draw. It seeks to overwhelm the opponent early in the game and maintain the advantage with a steady stream of threats.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's hand and board presence while also applying pressure with efficient creatures. By combining disruption elements like Duress and Gerrard's Verdict with powerful removal like Swords to Plowshares and Vindicate, the deck aims to control the game while beating down with aggressive creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Exalted Angel. The mana base is built to support the deck's color requirements and disrupt the opponent's mana base with cards like Wasteland. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently.

The deck focuses on using card draw, mana acceleration, and combo pieces to quickly assemble the Storm mechanic, allowing the player to cast a high number of spells in a single turn to win the game. Cards like Dream Halls and Show and Tell are key to this strategy, while Brain Freeze acts as the win condition by milling out the opponent's library. The deck aims to draw through its library rapidly with spells like Rush of Knowledge and Accumulated Knowledge, finding the pieces needed to create a powerful combo turn and secure victory.

The deck focuses on creating a strong engine of enchantments with cards like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards and generate resources. It aims to control the board with cards like Parallax Wave and Seal of Cleansing while ramping up mana with Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum. The key strategy is to play multiple enchantments quickly to overwhelm the opponent and win the game through a powerful combo or by establishing a dominant board presence.

The deck focuses on disruption and card advantage to control the game, with the goal of using Psychatog as the primary win condition. It includes a mix of counterspells, removal spells, and draw spells to protect and enable Psychatog while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The deck can also utilize Cunning Wish to access additional answers from the sideboard. Upheaval serves as a powerful reset button, while Zombie Infestation provides an alternate win condition. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through efficient plays and resource management.

The focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful, efficient win condition. The deck utilizes various cheap spells to control the game and protect the combo, while also digging through the deck to find the needed pieces. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while simultaneously setting up its own game-winning play. The combination of Dreadnought and Stifle allows for an explosive finish, catching opponents off guard and securing victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly play out aggressive creatures like Terravore and Nimble Mongoose, while disrupting the opponent's mana base with cards like Armageddon and Wasteland. Weathered Wayfarer helps tutor for necessary lands while Sylvan Library provides card advantage. The goal is to pressure the opponent early and quickly, using powerful land destruction effects to slow them down. Treetop Village and Rith's Grove provide additional threats, with Mox Diamond and Gemstone Mine helping to ramp up mana production. Naturalize and Disenchant offer answers to opposing threats.

The deck focuses on using Tinker to tutor for Phyrexian Devourer, then using Fling to sacrifice the Devourer to deal massive damage to the opponent. It includes cards like Altar of Dementia and Impulse to support the combo, while also utilizing mana ramp with cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb. The deck also includes cards like Defense Grid and Tsabo's Web to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect the combo.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence with efficient, low-cost creatures such as Silver Knight, Mother of Runes, and Soltari Priest. With the help of cards like Crusade and Whipcorder, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures. Additionally, disruption tools like Meddling Mage and Tithe help control the game while also using Cursed Scroll as a win condition. The deck's strategy revolves around aggressive play and maintaining pressure on the opponent through a constant stream of threats.
